[Skip to content](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/scorpion-control/#content)

# Scorpions

Scorpion Control

![Scorpion Control Services in Tyler TX](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/striped-bark-scorpion-1.jpg)

#### Scorpions

# Scorpion Control Services

When scorpions invade your home or yard, they aren’t just a nuisance—they can present a serious hazard to your family, pets, and property. At [Dang Pest Control,](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/) we specialize in delivering comprehensive scorpion pest control services designed to identify the root cause of the problem, eliminate scorpions effectively, and provide lasting prevention strategies. We serve Tyler, TX, and the surrounding areas. Call us today at [(903) 871-0550](tel:(903) 871-0550) and [get your quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/).

[(903) 871-0550](tel:(903)%20871-0550)

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

## Our Scorpion Control Process

## Step 1

## Inspection & Identification

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img1.png)

Our experienced technicians will carefully inspect your home and yard, identifying scorpions and uncovering the sources of infestation. This critical step allows us to locate hiding spots and entry points, ensuring complete and targeted treatment.

## Step 2

## Integrated Pest Management Plan

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img2.png)

Using a science-backed approach, we craft a tailored Integrated Pest Management Plan (IPMP) to address your unique circumstances. Our treatment doesn’t end with spraying; rather, we combine eco-conscious pest control solutions with preventative measures for long-term results.

## Step 3

## Long-Term Elimination

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img3.png)

We don’t stop after treatment. Our team will ensure your home remains free of scorpions. Plus, we provide expert advice to help prevent future infestations.

## Step 4

## Ongoing Monitoring & Prevention

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img4.png)

We monitor the effectiveness of the treatment, evaluate the results, and provide preventative care tips to ensure your property remains free of scorpions.

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

## Why Choose Us?

While scorpion control is our specialty, we’re proud to offer a range of [pest control services](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/pest-control/) to meet all of your needs. From [spiders](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/spider-control/) and [ants](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/ant-control/) to [wasps](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wasp-hornet-control/), [rodents](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/rodent-control/), and [termites](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/termite-inspections/), our technicians are equipped to handle any challenge.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Proven-Results.png)

### Expertise You Can Count On

With experience and membership with the National Pest Management Association (NPMA) and Texas Pest Control Association (TPCA), Dang Pest Control is recognized for excellence in the pest control industry.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Comprehensive.png)

### Eco-Conscious Methods

Our Integrated Pest Management approach prioritizes environmentally protective strategies, making us the responsible choice for pest control.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Safety.png)

### Reliable Solutions

We don’t believe in temporary fixes. Our tailored treatments ensure long-lasting relief from scorpions and other pest issues.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Guarantee.png)

### Local Expertise, Trusted Results

Based in Tyler, TX, we proudly serve the surrounding communities.

## Don’t Wait—Protect Your Home Today!

Located in Tyler, TX, Dang Pest Control serves clients across [Longview](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/longview-tx/), [Jacksonville](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/jacksonville-tx/), [Lindale](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/lindale-tx/), [Bullard](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/bullard-tx/), [Whitehouse](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/whitehouse-tx/), and neighboring areas. From identifying scorpions to eliminating and preventing infestations, we deliver results you can trust.
Call us today at [(903) 871-0550](tel:(903) 871-0550) and [get your quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/).

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/striped-bark-scorpion-2.jpg)

## Frequently Asked Questions

###### 1\. Are scorpions common in East Texas?

While more common in West Texas, scorpions — including Texas bark scorpions — are found in Tyler and surrounding wooded areas, especially near stacked wood and rock beds.

###### 2\. When are scorpions most active in Tyler?

Scorpions are most active during hot summer months but may seek shelter indoors during heavy rains or cooler weather shifts.

###### 3\. Are scorpion stings dangerous?

Most scorpion stings are painful but not life-threatening. However, children and pets may experience stronger reactions.

###### 4\. How do scorpions get inside homes?

They squeeze through small foundation cracks, under doors, and around utility lines — common in older East Texas homes.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Local-Experts.png)

## Protect Your East Texas Home Today

East Texas heat, humidity, and piney woods conditions create the perfect environment for pests year-round. Don’t wait until a small problem becomes a major infestation.

Dang Pest Control provides safe, effective, and recurring protection for homes across Tyler, Whitehouse, Bullard, Lindale, Flint, and surrounding communities.
